shared_case_surface: bounded path-sensitive tasks that keep why-path-matters evidence, inspectable tool traces, omission-or-churn notes, and failure-versus-readout distinctions visible on the same tool-trajectory surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same tool-trajectory question, keeps why the path matters visible before the trajectory is judged, and still covers sequencing-matters, avoidable churn, skipped obvious checks, disciplined-versus-noisy same-outcome, and tool-misuse-hides-risk pressures without collapsing the bundle into a generic workflow score or one hidden ideal sequence.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the tool evidence directly
why path matters stays visible in the case contract before any trajectory note
avoidable churn and obvious omissions remain inspectable as separate path failures
the public readout stays weaker than the visible tool-path evidence
